The '''M12-L Kimogila heavy fighter''' was the heaviest in [[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors]] line of snubfighters. The M12 was used by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] crime organizations to protect their 'interests' and were often crewed by [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:M12LKimogila-SWGMB.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A M12-L Kimogila heavy fighter]]
This custom [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] was long ranged and could serve multiple roles in [[Space warfare/Legends|space combat]]. Its numerous gun emplacements classified the ship as a heavy fighter, and its torpedo capabilities allowed it to function as a bomber in special circumstances. This flexibility made it quite popular among free [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]]. Though it lacked the speed and maneuvering capabilities of its predecessors, its ability to cause wanton slaughter could outweigh these factors.

==History==
Officially an upgrade of [[G1-M4-C Dunelizard fighter]], the Kimogila fighter was much more robust and heavier. It was designed by [[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors]] specifically for sale for corporations, criminal fleets, and private organizations.<ref name="RECG" />

The fighter was used during the [[Mandalorian–Ithullan war|Mandalorian-Ithullan war]], where it was used by the [[Aka'liit]] to hunt down [[Ithullan]] hideouts.<ref name="TBHC" />

{{Ship-stub}}
